query:
SELECT c.id as convId, c.sessionId, c.customerName, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.conversationId = c.id AND m.role = 'user') as user_msgs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.conversationId = c.id AND m.role = 'assistant') as assistant_msgs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.conversationId = c.id) as total_msgs
FROM conversations c WHERE c.channel = 'line' ORDER BY c.id;
